description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This T-shirt from nike has an ace print on the front, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable casual look.Product DetailsBlack T-shirt, graphic print on front, back and sleeve, round neck, short sleeves and branding on frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing size M
